name: 009-pci-dss-violations
description: PCI DSS pilot fixture: a small card-payments service with one violation per shipped rule — a card store that persists the full PAN as a plaintext column (PCI-001, Req 3.5.1), a charge path that POSTs the PAN to an http:// gateway (PCI-002, Req 4.2.1), an encrypt helper with a hardcoded AES key (PCI-003, Req 3.6/3.7), a card endpoint that reads cardholder data with only a console.log and no audit-trail entry (PCI-004, Req 10.2.1), and a payments DB pool that connects with the admin/admin vendor default credentials (PCI-005, Req 2.2.2/8.3.1).
